== Notes for [[Item:Q88637|Q88637]] ==

Numerius Julius Julus has another gap of about 560 years separating himfrom Julus, who was the son of Ascanius, who was the son of Aeneas,famous hero of The Iliad and The Aenead.

[SEE JULUS, SON OF ASCANIUS]

Caius Julius Julus was the son of Lucius Julius Julus, who was the son ofNumerius Julius Julus. There is then another gap of about 560 yearsseparating him from Julus, who was the son of Ascanius, who was the sonof Aeneas, famous hero of The Iliad and The Aenead.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940CFC0E81EFBBE49822EF79916C3020
geni:6000000014835622429

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
